title: The Two-Headed Asteroid That Surprised Us

scenes.text: Astronomers captured a photo of an asteroid with two heads!
Hayabusa2 captured stunning images of asteroid 1996 FG3 from over sixty million miles away.
It provides insights into how binary asteroids form and evolve over time.
A glimpse into the past of our solar system!
scenes.label: SOLAR SYSTEM SECRETS

scenes.text: Follow to feed your curious mind daily.

description: Asteroid 1996 FG3 challenges our understanding of space with its two-headed structure. Follow for daily science!
